Class StructureInfo<E extends Structure>

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.lang.SyntaxElementInfo<E>
org.skriptlang.skript.lang.structure.StructureInfo<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DefaultSyntaxInfos, SyntaxInfo<E>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SkriptEventInfo
@Deprecated(since="2.14", forRemoval=true) public class StructureInfo<E extends Structure> extends SyntaxElementInfo<E>
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure (DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure.builder(Class)) instead.
Special SyntaxElementInfo for DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structures that may contain information such as the EntryValidator.
